title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Prestige Estates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Prestige Estates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Prestige Estates are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Prestige Estates:
Prestige Estates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prestige Estates!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
